001/**
002 * Command class - represents a single user command in the game.
003 * A command is made of a main command word (e.g. "go", "help")
004 * and an optional second word (e.g. a direction like "north").
005 *
006 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
007 */
008public class Command {
009    private String aCommandWord;
010    private String aSecondWord;
011
012    /**
013     * Creates a command with the given main word and second word.
014     * Either of them may be null to represent an unknown or incomplete command.
015     *
016     * @param pCommandWord the main command word, or null if unknown
017     * @param pSecondWord  the second word, or null if there is none
018     */
019    public Command(final String pCommandWord, final String pSecondWord) {
020        this.aCommandWord = pCommandWord;
021        this.aSecondWord = pSecondWord;
022    }
023
024    /**
025     * Returns the main command word.
026     *
027     * @return the command word, or null if the command is unknown
028     */
029
030    public String getCommandWord() {
031        return this.aCommandWord;
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Returns the second word of this command.
036     *
037     * @return the second word, or null if there is none
038     */
039    public String getSecondWord() {
040        return this.aSecondWord;
041    }
042
043    /**
044     * Checks whether this command has a second word.
045     *
046     * @return true if the second word is not null, false otherwise
047     */
048    public boolean hasSecondWord() {
049        return (this.aSecondWord != null);
050    }
051
052    /**
053     * Checks whether this command is unknown (no valid command word).
054     *
055     * @return true if the command word is null, false otherwise
056     */
057
058    public boolean isUnknown() {
059        return (this.aCommandWord == null);
060    }
061} // Command
